<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis; use Predis\Command\Command as RedisCommand; /** * @see https://redis.io/commands/waitaof/ * * This command blocks the current client until all the previous write commands are acknowledged * as having been fsynced to the AOF of the local Redis and/or at least the specified number of replicas. */ class WAITAOF extends RedisCommand { public function getId() { return 'WAITAOF'; } }
